sources.name: NHS England
sources.dataset: Palliative and End of Life Care Statistics

sources.name: Public Health England
sources.dataset: National End of Life Care Intelligence Network

metadata.methodology: Bed count includes specialist palliative care inpatient beds in both NHS and voluntary sector hospices. Beds per 100,000 calculated against mid-year population estimates. Percentage dying without palliative care estimated from death registration data matched to palliative care contacts.
knownIssues: Hospice bed count excludes community palliative care nurse caseloads. Estimated shortfall of 1,200 beds is modelled against projected need from ageing population.
